description: Provider-facing structured output for a Codex-generated MemoSprout protection artifact.

sourceSproutId.description: Candidate Sprout ID supplied in the artifact prompt.

observational.description: Attests that enforcement observes repository state without mutating it.

reusesPureGenerator.description: Attests that enforcement imports the existing pure generator rendering logic.

comparisonStrategy.description: Attests that complete expected and committed outputs are compared byte-for-byte.

changedPaths.description: All repository paths changed by Codex. Application validation enforces exact cardinality and uniqueness.

summary.description: Concise description of the generated guidance and enforcement.
